species: Ethical committee permission to work with primordial oocytes from human ovary samples was obtained...
tissue: Ethical committee permission to work with primordial oocytes from human ovary samples was obtained...
cell_type: Oocytes prevent the production of reactive oxygen species by remodelling the mitochondrial electron transport chain...
disease_state: Thus, we report a physiological cell type without complex I in animals. Our findings also clarify why patients with complex-I-related hereditary mitochondrial diseases do not experience subfertility.
sample_source: Ethical committee permission to work with primordial oocytes from human ovary samples was obtained...
age: Ovaries were provided by the gynaecology service of Hospital Clinic de Barcelona, from women aged 19 to 34 undergoing ovarian surgery...
cell_line: HeLa cells were obtained from ATCC (CCL2), authenticated based on morphological inspection...
sex: Xenopus laevis adult females of between 2 and 4 years old were purchased from Nasco...
strain: The C57BL/6J mice used in the experiments were purchased from Charles River Laboratories...
